info.english_meaning: to blowto blossomto burstto break opento split open
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' viSaraRe ' iti vopadevaH  ' kramAd vikAse SaSapo: sPuwati sPowate pade ' (Slo.70) iti devaH  kzIrataraNgiRyAM DAturayaM na dfSyate

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'AsPowayattaTA''kASe DarmaH prApto mayeti vE' (BA0 SAM0 26141) bAhuSabdamakarodityarTaH
'tasyAsPowitaSabdena mahatA SrotrapAtinA peturvihaNgamAstatra cEtyapAlASca mohitAH' (rA0 547) .. AsPowitam bAhutAqanaSabdaH
